2606.21124.title: PulseCX: Breaking the Closed-World Assumption in Real-Time CX
2606.21124.paper_summary: Conversational AI agents in Customer Experience (CX) typically suffer from a Closed-World Constraint, ignoring high-velocity external shifts like viral trends or outages. Ad-hoc web search attempts to bridge this gap but often introduce prohibitive latency and context poisoning. We introduce PulseCX, a framework that decouples knowledge acquisition from consumption. Adopting a structure-first paradigm, PulseCX employs an asynchronous agent to linearize signals into a Decay-Aware Temporal Knowledge Graph (DA-TKG) governed by reinforcement--decay dynamics to actively manage information lifecycles. By coupling this self-evolving memory with hierarchical intent gating, PulseCX removes synchronous search bottlenecks (<10ms overhead) and drives significant gains in Intent Resolution (IRR) and Customer Satisfaction (s-CSAT) in dynamic environments.
2606.21124.paper_summary_zh: 對話式人工智慧代理在客戶體驗 (CX) 中通常受到封閉世界限制的影響，忽略了像病毒趨勢或故障這樣的高速度外部變化。臨時的網路搜尋試圖彌補這一差距，但往往會引入過高的延遲和上下文污染。我們介紹了 PulseCX，一個將知識獲取與消費解耦的框架。採用結構優先的範式，PulseCX 使用異步代理將信號線性化為一個受強化-衰減動力學驅動的衰減感知時間知識圖 (DA-TKG)，以主動管理信息生命周期。通過將這種自我演化的記憶與分層意圖閘結合，PulseCX 消除了同步搜尋瓶頸（<10ms 的開銷），並在動態環境中驅動意圖解析 (IRR) 和客戶滿意度 (s-CSAT) 的顯著提升。
2606.21124.author: Rajat Agarwal et.al.
2606.21124.authors: Rajat Agarwal, Suvidha Tripathi, Shubham Sharma
